rationale.R1.2: The output identifies a critical logical inconsistency (issue 1) and provides localized fixes, walking the argument chain end-to-end.
rationale.RX.1: The output clearly marks uncertainty for multiple claims, including the baseline definition, attribution of gains, and evaluation protocol specifics.
rationale.RX.3: The output covers exactly the agreed J*(d), addressing all six issues identified in detail.
rationale.RX.4: The output does not introduce new errors or harmful content; it only identifies existing gaps and inconsistencies.
rationale.RX.5: Every non-cosmetic change is annotated with source and reason, providing clear provenance.
